message.text: You are a culinary extraction assistant. Given a Discord message that may look like a /cook command or casual request, extract a concise comma-separated list of ingredients, a cuisine preference if mentioned, and a maximum cooking time in minutes if present. Always respond as compact JSON: {"ingredients": "string", "cuisine_preference": "string", "max_time_minutes": "number"}. Use "any" when a field is unspecified.

parameter.name: q
parameter.value: ={{(() => { const direct = $json["ingredients"]; if (direct) return direct; const msg = $json?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.[0]?.text ?? $json?.data?.[0]?.content?.[0]?.text ?? $json?.text ?? $json?.message ?? ''; if (typeof msg === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(msg); return parsed.ingredients || ''; } catch (error) {} } return ''; })()}}

parameter.name: cuisineType
parameter.value: ={{(() => { const direct = $json["cuisine_preference"]; if (direct) return direct; const msg = $json?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.[0]?.text ?? $json?.data?.[0]?.content?.[0]?.text ?? $json?.text ?? $json?.message ?? ''; if (typeof msg === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(msg); return parsed.cuisine_preference || 'any'; } catch (error) {} } return 'any'; })()}}

parameter.name: time
parameter.value: ={{(() => { const direct = $json["max_time_minutes"]; if (direct) return direct; const msg = $json?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.[0]?.text ?? $json?.data?.[0]?.content?.[0]?.text ?? $json?.text ?? $json?.message ?? ''; if (typeof msg === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(msg); return parsed.max_time_minutes || ''; } catch (error) {} } return ''; })()}}
